title: lithospermum muricatum
intro: Lithospermum muricatum, also known as Prickly Gromwell, is a perennial plant species in the borage family native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lithospermum muricatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lithospermum muricatum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
